risk_factors: Net interest margin compression as deposit beta rises
Regulatory scrutiny on overdraft and NSF fees
company.ai_summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. sits in the Moderate risk band. Revenue trajectory is modest positive, complaint volume is in line with sector medians (50/qtr normalized), and 8-K activity is unremarkable. We see no near-term catalyst that changes the constructive view.
